⚡
ez lister
Dealer inventory to Marketplace drafts

List dealership vehicles from the inventory page.

ez lister adds a fast List button to supported dealership vehicle cards, then prepares a Facebook Marketplace vehicle draft in the salesperson's own browser.

⚡
ez lister
Fill the vehicle form, then review and publish

Vehicle details and photos are filled for review.

The extension runs in each user's logged-in browser session. It fills the draft and leaves the final Publish click to the salesperson.

✓ Ready to review
⚡
ez lister
No Facebook passwords, no shared accounts

Built for salespeople using their own account.

ez lister does not ask for Facebook credentials. It stores vehicle drafts locally in Chrome and fills Marketplace in the user's existing browser session.

What stays local
Vehicle draft details, VIN, price, mileage, selected photos, and temporary form-fill status stay in Chrome extension storage.
✓ User reviews before publishing
✓
What is not collected
No Facebook username or password. No shared login. No automatic final Publish click. No credential handoff to a backend.
✓ Browser-session based workflow
⚡
ez lister

Fast Marketplace vehicle drafts.

Add List buttons to dealership cards and prepare Facebook vehicle listings.

⚡
ez lister

Marketplace vehicle drafts in seconds.

Turn supported dealership inventory pages into review-ready Facebook vehicle listings.
